ratings.description: The evaluation of the professional activities of scientific and pedagogical workers is a component of the internal system for ensuring the quality of higher education and educational activities of the university.

workload.update_info: Data is updated once every 3 days

about.title: About the Project
about.description_1: An open space for academic achievements. All key information about lecturers, their scientific activities and professional accomplishments is collected in a single system.
about.description_2: It aims to disseminate knowledge at the national and world levels about the achievements of university staff in scientific and educational work, exchange experience and promote communication.

support.title: How can we help you?
support.intro: The automated information system "Web-pages of scientific and pedagogical workers" ("Intellect") automatically aggregates data from various University services. To ensure your question is resolved as quickly as possible, please address it to the relevant specialists:

bibliometrics.title: Bibliometric databases and profiles
bibliometrics.description: If you notice discrepancies in the links to your bibliometric profiles (Scopus, Web of Science, Google Scholar, ORCID), please contact the Bibliometrics Department of the Library:

load.title: Academic load and positions
load.description: If you see inaccuracies, please contact support:

important.title: 📌 Important to know:
important.item_1: The platform displays exclusively verified achievements from the Goal Setting module in the "my.kpi.ua" IS.
important.item_2: Data in the system is updated once every 3 days. If you have just made changes to the primary source, please wait for the update.
important.item_3: For security reasons and according to University policy, only corporate communication means are displayed in public profiles.
